notes: Identify dashboard family before selecting procedure.
Check current tool coverage for facelift vehicles.
OBDSTAR lists Arteon in its Volkswagen key-programming coverage, but the model entry alone is not enough to mark every dashboard or AKL route verified.
For any Arteon fitted with an MQB48-5A dashboard, OBDSTAR officially confirms AKL support through the RH850/V850 Adapter Kit, subject to exact dashboard identification.
OBDSTAR March 2026 coverage explicitly adds D70F3525-V5 Program Keys using C4-06 with online synchronisation-code calculation.
Do not infer MQB49-5C support from MQB48 evidence; the current OBDSTAR adapter documentation keeps 5C unsupported on that route.

official_evidence.source: OBDSTAR X300 MINI VW official product coverage
official_evidence.scope: Arteon listed for Volkswagen key programming

official_evidence.source: OBDSTAR RH850/V850 Adapter Kit product documentation
official_evidence.scope: MQB48-5A/5B dashboard data reading and adapter requirements
MQB48-5A D70F3525-V5 Program Keys, AKL, C4-06 and online synchronisation calculation
